nasb.text: To the sons of Gershom, according to their families, were given from the tribe of Issachar and from the tribe of Asher, the tribe of Naphtali, and the tribe of Manasseh, thirteen cities in Bashan.

esv.text: To the Gershomites according to their clans were allotted thirteen cities out of the tribes of Issachar, Asher, Naphtali and Manasseh in Bashan.

cnv.text: 革順的子孫，按著他們的家族，從以薩迦支派、亞設支派、拿弗他利支派和巴珊地的瑪拿西支派中，分得十三座城。

ccb.text: 革顺各宗族的人从以萨迦、亚设和拿弗他利支派以及玛拿西支派的巴珊地区分到了十三座城。
